violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. PIC states application was placed in the mail. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

Various foods in the walk-in cooler were observed held at 44-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Time/temperature abused foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The walk-in cooler was observed at 50-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration for food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
2 door lowboy was observed at 55 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2023
